details.productUrlName: Winds of Abandon JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description:
Exile target creature you don't control. For each creature exiled this way, its controller searches their library for a basic land card. Those players put those cards onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
Overload 4WW (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
